Work With Us
Flexible Models · Custom Collaboration Plans · Contact for Details · Analytics Reports Included on All Packages
Customised collaboration plans are available
Brands, agencies and long-term partners can reach out for a tailored collaboration plan, campaign structure and payment details based on format, timing and platform mix.
📸
Pay Per Post
Most Flexible
  • Single dedicated promotional post per order
  • Available on Instagram, Facebook, or Threads
  • Full caption and hashtag strategy written for you
  • Platform-native format: Reel, Carousel, or Static Post
  • 48-hour delivery guarantee from brief submission
  • 7-day post-publish performance screenshot report
  • Revisions included until brand is fully satisfied
🎯
Pay Per Campaign
Most Popular
  • 3–5 coordinated posts across a defined campaign period
  • Cross-platform activation: IG + FB + Threads available
  • Story series with trackable swipe-up CTA links included
  • Dedicated Reel and Carousel format options per platform
  • Content calendar provided before campaign launch date
  • Full analytics report with screenshots at campaign close
  • Campaign strategy consultation call included
📦
Monthly Content Package
Best Value
  • Monthly retainer structure — 8 to 12 posts per month
  • All three platforms included: IG + FB + Threads
  • Collaborative content calendar co-created each month
  • Permanent brand mention and link-in-bio placement slot
  • Priority response via dedicated WhatsApp channel
  • Monthly performance dashboard with full metrics breakdown
  • Volume pricing — most cost-effective per-post rate
🏢
Agency / Combo Model
Custom Rate
  • Tailored for agency and multi-brand partnerships
  • White-label content creation available on request
  • Multi-brand campaign management on one timeline
  • Priority booking with guaranteed first-slot availability
  • Custom reporting formats aligned to agency KPI dashboards
  • Volume discounts available for 3+ month commitments
  • Dedicated account manager contact for all agencies

A Message to Our Partners
📡 The Channel
CorporateGuild | @it_jobs_and_internships is India's most engaged career-focused creator community across Instagram, Facebook and Threads. Published daily, the content covers:
  • Campus placement drives and off-campus job opportunities
  • Internship listings, deadlines and application walkthroughs
  • Career growth strategies and salary negotiation guides
  • Tech industry news, hiring trends and company spotlights
  • Interview preparation tips and resume building advice
  • Real placement stories from followers to build social proof
🎯 Audience Advantage
This audience is uniquely high-intent — every viewer is actively planning their career. Key advantages for brand partners:
  • Core 18–28 bracket — first-time earners, high product adoptability
  • 78% concentrated in Tier-1 cities: Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Hyderabad
  • Growing US/UK diaspora with global career and product aspirations
  • App install rates consistently outperform benchmark CPIs by 2–3×
  • Sign-up and course enrollment rates above all platform averages
  • High purchase intent for EdTech, FinTech, and career platforms

🤝 Partnership Deliverables
  • Dedicated promotional posts and short-form Reels
  • Instagram Stories series with trackable swipe-up CTAs
  • Cross-platform campaigns spanning all 3 active channels
  • Honest product reviews and brand testimonial content
  • 48–72 hour guaranteed turnaround on all deliverables
  • Post-campaign analytics report with verified screenshots
  • Brand-safe, FTC-compliant sponsored content disclosures
  • Dedicated WhatsApp channel for campaign coordination
"Our audience follows us because they trust our recommendations. They are not passive scrollers — they are students and young professionals making real career decisions every single day. When a brand is featured on this channel, it is not just an impression — it is a warm, high-intent introduction to a motivated, decision-ready community that acts on what they see."

  • Niche Dominance: Only India-focused Campus Placement creator

Monthly Follower Growth — Nov 23 to Dec 22
  • Insights window: Nov 23 – Dec 22, 2024
  • 70.2M views in this 30-day period alone
  • Steady net positive follower acquisition daily
  • Growth rate accelerating — positive compounding trend
  • No single viral spike — sustainable consistent growth
  • Algorithm rewarding consistent daily publishing cadence
Growth Snapshot — Nov 16 to Dec 15, 2024
  • Insights window: Nov 16 – Dec 15, 2024
  • Visible acceleration in follower growth trajectory
  • Views increased significantly compared to prior period
  • Engagement rate maintained above 5% through period
  • Cross-platform Facebook + Threads spillover boosting IG
  • Placement season driving organic audience expansion
Growth Snapshot — Oct 26 to Nov 24, 2024
  • Insights window: Oct 26 – Nov 24, 2024
  • Strong consistent daily new follower acquisition
  • Post performance improving month-over-month
  • Reels driving majority of new follower conversion
  • Career alert content resonating with college crowd
  • Cross-platform strategy amplifying Instagram growth
📈 Growth Strategy Behind These Numbers
📅 Daily Consistency
  • Posted every day without a single gap
  • Algorithm rewards consistent cadence
  • Audience builds daily return habit
  • Compounding follower growth effect
🎬 Reel-First Format
  • Short-form video outperforms all formats
  • Career Reels get algorithmically boosted
  • Hook-driven openings drive 3-sec retention
  • Vertical format perfectly suits mobile audience
🔄 Viral Mechanics
  • Audience shares job alerts to entire peer group
  • Tag-a-friend format expands reach organically
  • Save-worthy content drives long-term discovery
  • Deadline urgency creates immediate share impulse

Age & Gender Breakdown

Interaction Overview — Last 90 Days (4 Dec – 3 Mar)
  • 267,823 total interactions across all content in 90 days
  • +29.1% growth vs the previous 90-day period — accelerating
  • Interaction types: likes, comments, shares, reactions, and saves
  • Strongest interaction days: Monday through Wednesday consistently
  • Video content drives the highest interaction rates across all post types
  • Page health metrics are strong and all trending in positive direction
Views & Reach Dashboard — Facebook Page
  • 8M+ monthly video views at peak — far above niche benchmark
  • Organic reach consistently high across both video and image posts
  • Video watch-through rate performing above Meta platform benchmark
  • Audience actively returning to page for fresh daily career content
  • Cross-posted Instagram Reels performing exceptionally well on Facebook
  • Algorithm rewarding daily publishing with expanded organic distribution
📊 Why Facebook Matters for Brand Partners
  • Facebook audience skews 25–34 — working professionals with purchasing power
  • 267,823 interactions in 90 days shows deeply engaged, not passive, community
  • +29.1% interaction growth confirms accelerating momentum, not plateau
  • Video content gets organic boosting to non-page followers via Facebook feed
  • Facebook shares create secondary viral distribution loops beyond direct followers
  • Older 25–40 demographic has higher disposable income for premium products
  • Cross-posting with Instagram creates unified multi-platform campaign amplification
  • Meta ecosystem allows retargeting opportunities for data-driven brand advertisers

Facebook Metrics
Meta Business Suite insights · 47,371 followers · latest-first audience and content view
Audience Overview — Last 90 Days (4 Dec – 3 Mar)
  • 47,371 total page followers as of last 90-day reporting window
  • Strong organic follower growth — +17.6% vs previous 90-day period
  • No paid follower acquisition — all growth is 100% organic
  • Audience heavily concentrated in 18–34 age bracket
  • India represents the primary geographic market for this page
  • All page health and reach metrics trending strongly in positive direction
Content Interaction Mix — Type Breakdown
  • Multiple content formats all driving strong interactions
  • Video content dominates interaction share across all post types
  • Reels cross-posted from Instagram performing outstandingly on Facebook
  • Carousel posts driving high save and share rates per post
  • Photo posts maintaining steady baseline engagement throughout
  • Video reactions running 3× higher than image post reactions
Audience Demographics — Age & Gender
  • 25-34 is the strongest age bracket, followed by 18-24 and 35-44.
  • Women lead the audience mix, with a balanced working-professional demographic.
  • India remains the key market, supported by meaningful audience pockets outside India.
  • The profile is highly aligned to campus, early-career and upskilling brand categories.
  • Demographic clarity makes campaign targeting sharper across Meta placements.
  • This audience mix supports both awareness and conversion-led brand collaborations.

Facebook Metrics
Meta Business Suite content, reach and discovery breakdown
Facebook Top Videos — Highest Performing Video Content
  • Top individual videos accumulating hundreds of thousands of views each
  • Job alert and hiring announcement videos consistently rank as top performers
  • Company hiring open day videos drive the highest audience share rates
  • Placement success story videos generate the most comments and discussions
  • Interview tips format consistently achieves the highest post saves and bookmarks
  • Video completion rates above Meta benchmark for career content category
Views by Followers vs Non-Followers
  • Non-follower views dominate, confirming strong organic discovery beyond the page base.
  • Followers still contribute a dependable repeat-view layer for campaign consistency.
  • The split shows Facebook content is reaching fresh audiences at scale.
  • Career content is well suited to share-driven expansion inside the Meta ecosystem.
  • This discovery mix supports both upper-funnel reach and mid-funnel brand recall.
  • A healthy non-follower skew gives new campaigns room to scale quickly.
Discovery Split — Supporting Reach Snapshot
  • A second reach split view reinforces how much discovery is coming from outside the existing follower base.
  • Facebook recommendations and shares are broadening exposure for every strong post.
  • This pattern is particularly useful for product, app-install and awareness campaigns.
  • Consistent publishing keeps content in rotation long enough to compound total views.
  • The page benefits from both repeat audiences and share-led expansion.
  • Discovery remains one of the clearest strengths of the Facebook channel.
🧠 Content Philosophy — Why It Consistently Performs
⚡
Hyper-Relevant & Timely
  • Every post solves a real, immediate, time-sensitive career problem
  • Job alerts published same day as company announcements
  • Audience returns daily expecting fresh, actionable content
  • Content calendar aligned with hiring seasons and exam cycles
  • Deadline urgency creates immediate save-and-share behaviour
🎯
Trust-First Always
  • Unsponsored content outnumbers sponsored posts at 8:1 ratio
  • Honest opinions on companies and platforms shared freely
  • Community Q&A sessions build authentic two-way relationships
  • Transparent disclosures on all brand partnership content
  • Credibility is never compromised for short-term brand deals
🔄
Engineered for Sharing
  • Content designed natively for peer-to-peer distribution
  • Tag-a-friend format built into most posts organically
  • Saves-worthy checklists and deadline reminders in every post
  • Information density encourages screenshot and forward sharing
  • Share rate consistently above industry benchmark for niche

Threads Metrics
CorporateGuild | @it_jobs_and_internships · 22K+ followers · fastest-growing platform in the portfolio
Follower Overview — 90 Days
  • Latest follower snapshot shows the account moving through the 21K+ range toward 22K+.
  • Growth is organic and sits on top of strong crossover awareness from Instagram.
  • The follower curve confirms the platform is still in an expansion phase, not a plateau.
  • Career updates, salary posts and opportunity threads are attracting repeat audience behaviour.
  • Threads is adding a fresh text-first layer to the portfolio for brands that want conversation-led visibility.
Threads Overview & Total Reach
  • The 90-day insights summary shows a strong reach foundation for a fast-scaling newer channel.
  • Threads is well suited to commentary, opportunity alerts and quick, high-frequency updates.
  • Summary-level visibility helps brands understand momentum at a glance before campaign planning.
  • Reach is being supported by both existing followers and people discovering the posts organically.
  • The platform adds lightweight, conversational impressions to the broader campaign mix.
Audience Insights — Age Range
  • The audience profile skews young, with strong early-career relevance for brands.
  • It mirrors the wider community focus on jobs, internships, salaries and growth.
  • This demographic fit is especially useful for EdTech, FinTech and career platform partners.
  • A clear age profile improves message clarity across both awareness and action-led campaigns.
  • The Threads audience complements Instagram rather than duplicating it exactly.
Top Locations — City Breakdown
  • City distribution reinforces the strong Tier-1 urban concentration seen across the portfolio.
  • Bangalore and other major metro cities show meaningful relevance for brand targeting.
  • Location concentration increases campaign efficiency for education, app and service brands.
  • The location spread also supports regional relevance without diluting the premium urban core.
  • For brands, this means the Threads audience is both young and commercially meaningful.
Threads Overview & Total Reach
  • 22K+ followers growing at fastest rate in portfolio
  • Text-first format is ideally suited to career advice content
  • High impression-to-follower ratio indicates strong algorithmic reach
  • Reposts and quote-posts driving significant organic discovery
  • Strong audience overlap with Instagram for cross-platform targeting
Audience Insights — Threads Demographics
  • Predominantly 18–30 age bracket — youngest audience of all platforms
  • Tech and career-interested demographic confirmed by topic engagement
  • High interaction rate on job listing and company culture posts
  • Geographic profile mirrors Instagram — Tier-1 Indian cities dominant
  • Engagement rate above platform average for creators in growth phase
Content Performance — Threads Analytics
  • Career announcement posts achieving highest reach per post
  • Job listing threads getting quoted and shared widely by users
  • Salary discussion threads drive the highest comment counts
  • Placement success stories receive the most positive reactions
  • Daily posting maintains consistent audience touchpoint and discovery
